item.dc:creator: rightcoastguy

item.title: Tick Tick Tick, Tricks First Dump. BOOM!
item.description:
Here We Go Imgurians!
Strap In And Enjoy The Ride!
Yuuurrrr! One way Street to Halloween Town!
Next Stop We Visit the Huuuge Swiffftyyy BRO
Side Tracking to a local Festival
Next Stop on the Trick Train we go back in time to visit a lovey Birthday : )
Those who’re drinking Please Reach to Your left for your Slice of Bread. Free with the Trip!
Everyone Should call out Some Great usernames in the comments during our Trip!
See if anyone can beat ConQueefadore
Next Stop! The Marvel Universe!! Be sure to put on your 3D glasses!
^ ^ ^ ^ ^
Rest here my fellow Imgurians : )
Just Kidding we’re not on the Trick Train.. you are all heavy medicated While We go through imgurian Universes in a Hospital
Sorry Wrong Note Card. ALL ABOARD!!!
Now We Venture off into The Land of Bad Assness
Sorry Looking for My next Note Card >_
Next Stop The Land of Fantasy Yall!!
Train Stops here at Disney Land. Be sure to Grab Yourselves a Toaster!!
Everyone Back on Zay Train!! Hurry! Disney Characters are Gaining for Admissions Fee!
Get those Stretches in Ingurians!
One of The Imgurian Passengers Trying to get a Drink before our next Stop
Don’t Forget Your Free Hot Chocolate At the Finish Line!!!
Sadly… Passengers.. We have lost one of our fellow imgurians before our next stop.. RIP
Next Stop. We learn to Dance from the Norwegian people? >_>
Alright y’all!! That’s the end of The Trick Train!! Please report to the nearest exit and bring all Your Items
Final Announcement to you Passengers
Thanks Yall! Don’t let the door Hit you on the way out and I Hope you enjoyed the Trip!
TrickTrain Was Funded By Cat Tax
item.dc:creator: TrickSterXx

item.title: What is this cra .... Damn, son!!
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: I'm so proud!
item.description: She is 13 and skating is her life. Due to the covid restrictions she lost almost 18 months of training on ice but kept working hard off ice to keep her fitness levels up. Due to the lost time she aged out of the previous level and has spent the last 12 months training to pass tests and get to a point where she could compete at this higher category. She competed a couple of weeks ago for the first time at this level of competition and we've just found out she's qualified for the national championships at the end of this month.
item.dc:creator: EspeciallyWeeRob
